tone.notes: Americans respond to direct value statements and specific numbers. Lead with ROI. Use contractions freely. First-name basis from the first email. Keep emails under 120 words. Get to the point in sentence 2.

blackout_periods.name: US Thanksgiving Week
blackout_periods.description: Low open rates — most operators offline

blackout_periods.name: July 4th Week
blackout_periods.description: Peak summer rental season — operators are heads-down, not checking email

localization.measurement_notes: Use miles, gallons, and USD. Fleet size in number of vehicles.

compliance.opt_out_language: To unsubscribe, reply STOP or click here.
compliance.required_footer: You're receiving this because you operate a car rental business in the US. We respect your inbox.
compliance.notes: Include physical address in footer. One-click unsubscribe required.

cultural_notes: US car rental operators tend to be owner-operated, especially regional and multi-location independents. Many are family businesses — this is a strong emotional hook. Summer (Memorial Day through Labor Day) and major holidays are peak periods; avoid outreach in the week leading up to them as operators are heads-down managing fleet and staffing.
